Describe what this PR changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update

## Validation

List commands executed and summarize outcomes.

- [ ] Scope remains minimal (no SLAM/ROS/system expansion)

- [ ] No unrelated changes included
